name: Unofficial Telegram User Bridge
description: Agent tools for live Telegram user account (MTProto via Telethon bridge). Use only with explicit user consent.

apiToken.description: Optional Bearer token (set TELEGRAM_BRIDGE_API_TOKEN on backend to require)

replyDelaySec.description: Reply delay override enforced by the backend

replyDelayMaxSec.description: Optional max delay override enforced by the backend

allowFrom.description: Allowed chat ids/usernames enforced by the backend (* = all)

denyFrom.description: Denied chat ids/usernames enforced by the backend
